basic_details.short_information: Aruna Asaf Ali Government Hospital (AAAGH Delhi) Senior Resident (OBG) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AAAGH Delhi. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable as per applicable rules for reserved category on the date of Interview. OBC candidate should have OBC certificate issued by Delhi Government.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution, Registered with Delhi Medical Council (DMC) with MBBS and requisite postgraduate qualification

content_sections.heading: AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AAAGH Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Job 2026 Notification PDF

AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution. Registered with Delhi Medical Council (DMC) with MBBS and requisite postgraduate qualification.

content_sections.heading: AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable as per applicable rules for reserved category on the date of Interview. OBC candidate should have OBC certificate issued by Delhi Government.

content_sections.heading: AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 67700 Per Month plus usual allowances

content_sections.heading: AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AAAGH Delhi Senior Resident (OBG) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AAAGH Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Aruna Asaf Ali Government Hospital recruitment is Senior Resident (OBG).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident (OBG) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Senior Resident (OBG) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident (OBG) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 67700 Per Month plus usual allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MBBS with a P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty and registration with the Delhi Medical Council (DMC).

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident (OBG) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years, with relaxations applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Aruna Asaf Ali Government Hospital (AAAGH Delhi) office.
